meaning: n.[动]非洲的小人猿,黑猩猩
examples: After all, who could look at a chimpanzee on a unicycle and comprehend its real situation?
This second chimpanzee is not a relative of the first chimpanzee, and they've never seen each other before.
Short sleeves, after all, carry the whiff of the simian: isn't it the chimpanzee that generally performs in something less than a long sleeve?
The park, Tanzania's most remote and one of its most alluring, is first and foremost a chimpanzee sanctuary.
Professor McGrew said the team was starting to see new patterns of chimpanzee behaviour emerging.
